<3

<3

Intro:

The night was unusually quiet. Ghost was roaming around the forest, as he usually does. Keeping watch for any humans nearby. They were reckless creatures. Venturing too far into the hurdled trees that surrounded the area with darkness even the sunlight couldn't pierce through. He took slow measured steps, focusing on the sounds around him. No footsteps, no twigs snapping, only the cold night wind blowing through the leaves. Good. He could have at least one peaceful night to himself instead of scaring foolish humans away from danger.

He leaned up against an old tree, a sliver of moonlight cut through the dense branches just to watch his red eyes glow. A mockery of his immortality. "Tch..." He looked away, tugging the hood from his cloak further down to hide his shame. Many decades ago a vampire countess offered him eternal power and gold in exchange for his family, not knowing the kind of deal he was signing up for, he took it. Because he was selfish, proud, too stubborn to see anything other than his own benefit. Now the moon mocks him...forever haunted by his shame.
creator: Eldinnn_0
